case_title: CASTILLO, MANUEL et al vs. SIMPSON, SHELLIE et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTILLO, MANUEL MORALES, MONICA PATTERSON, JOSEPH REYES, TONY AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, SHELLIE DOES 1 TO 60 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-06-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-07-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-18-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-06-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON OCT-06-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR NOV-06-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-06-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON NOV-06-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND OSC FOR PLAINTIFF, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-01-1995 CONTINUED FROM NOV-06-1995 TO DEC-06-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF CASTILLO, MANUEL MORALES, MONICA PATTERSON, JOSEPH REYES, TONY
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
